payload.wp_title: Chokepoint seam adoption + retire bespoke primary-anchor helper pair
Literal-ban architectural ratchet for gate-command planning reads
record-analysis self-bookkeeping allowlist + in-mission meta-reader sweep
#2074 test_mid8_direct_routing fixture re-pin to production-shaped meta.json (Lane B)
Accept-gate multi-site split — planning reads → seam, KEEP status reads
setup-plan re-point onto the kind-aware seam
Behavioral verification, flattened regression, arch-gate sweep, issue-matrix closeout
Write-surface resolver foundation — re-point commit/branch resolution onto the primary/kind-aware seam

review.reference: Review passed: test-only regression guard for #2091. Real entry point: _wrap_with_decision_git_log (next path); CoordinationWorkspace.resolve mocked only to isolate — guard fires at :224 before reaching the mock (proven by revert). No product change (git diff = 1 test file, status clean after revert/restore). Positive path uses realistic 26-char ULID. ruff clean; mypy clean on test file (sole error is pre-existing schema.py product issue, not WP07).

Full acceptance suite 56 passed.
